sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20358" key="borboro/ph" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βορβορόπη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20358.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filthily lewd</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
